title: Support Worker
description:
We are seeking warm, motivated Support Workers to join our Leeds services. You will provide person-centred support to adults with learning disabilities, enabling them to live independently and participate in their local community.

Key responsibilities:
- Supporting with personal care and daily living tasks
- Encouraging independence and informed choice
- Supporting access to social and community activities

You will work as part of a supportive team and receive full training and development opportunities.

Flexible working patterns including evenings and weekends are required.
summary: Support Worker role in Leeds supporting independent living and daily care.

title: Care Assistant
description:
Care Assistants are required in Leeds to support vulnerable individuals in a variety of care settings.

Duties include:
- Assisting with personal care
- Supporting day-to-day routines
- Providing emotional support and companionship

Candidates must have previous care experience and a strong understanding of safeguarding.

Flexible shifts are available.
summary: Care Assistant role in Leeds supporting vulnerable individuals in care settings.

title: Behaviour Support Worker
company: Veritas Education Recruitment Ltd • Agency • Contract
description:
Behaviour Support Worker required in Leeds to work within an alternative provision.

Responsibilities:
- Provide 1:1 behavioural support for pupils
- Support emotional regulation and engagement in lessons
- Work closely with teaching and pastoral staff

Experience supporting SEMH needs is essential.

Training opportunities are provided.
summary: Behaviour Support Worker role in Leeds supporting SEMH pupils in education.

title: Residential Support Worker
description:
Residential Support Worker role in Bradford supporting children and young people within a care environment.

Duties include:
- Providing day-to-day care and supervision
- Supporting emotional and behavioural development
- Maintaining a safe and structured environment

Previous experience is desirable. Shift work including evenings and weekends is required.
summary: Residential Support Worker role in Bradford supporting young people in care.

title: Support Worker Driver
description:
Support Worker Driver role in Bradford supporting individuals with mental health needs.

Responsibilities:
- Providing emotional and practical support
- Assisting with daily tasks and routines
- Transporting service users to appointments and activities

A full UK driving licence is required for this role.
summary: Support Worker Driver role in Bradford supporting mental health service users.

title: Recovery Support Worker
description:
Recovery Support Worker role supporting individuals with mental health needs in Bradford.

Duties include:
- Delivering recovery-focused support
- Supporting service users within the community
- Maintaining care plans and accurate records

Applicants should have relevant experience in mental health support.
summary: Recovery Support Worker role in Bradford supporting mental health recovery.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker role in Dewsbury supporting adults with learning disabilities.

Responsibilities:

Full training is provided and flexible shift patterns are available.
summary: Support Worker role in Dewsbury supporting independent living.

title: SEN Support Worker
description:
SEN Support Worker role supporting children with additional needs in Halifax.

Responsibilities:
- Providing 1:1 and small group support
- Supporting behaviour and communication strategies
- Assisting learning and engagement in the classroom

Experience supporting SEN is required.
summary: SEN Support Worker role in Halifax supporting children with additional needs.

title: Support Worker
description:
Support Worker role in Wakefield supporting adults with learning disabilities.

Responsibilities:

You will work as part of a supportive team and receive full training and development.
summary: Support Worker role in Wakefield supporting daily living and independence.
